data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the next-eligible-delivery timestamp.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'next-eligible-delivery timestamp to enforce cool-down', which is a specific requirement mentioned in the linked use case. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence related to this timestamp or its functionality, leading to an inconclusive result. The evidence primarily covers other aspects of the saga lifecycle without addressing the specific requirement for the cool-down mechanism.
gaps: Next-eligible-delivery timestamp is not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
